title: Agent Performance
description: Per-agent runtime metrics: turns, tokens, duration, persona breakdown

panels.title: Average Turns Per Run
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(runtime_num_turns AS DOUBLE)), 1) as avg_turns FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_num_turns IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS'

panels.title: Average Input Tokens Per Run
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(runtime_input_tokens AS DOUBLE)), 0) as avg_input FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS'

panels.title: Average Output Tokens Per Run
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(runtime_output_tokens AS DOUBLE)), 0) as avg_output FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_output_tokens IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS'

panels.title: Duration by Persona
panels.query: SELECT tb1_persona as persona, ROUND(AVG(duration / 1000000), 1) as avg_seconds FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.phase.persona' AND tb1_persona IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' GROUP BY persona ORDER BY avg_seconds DESC

panels.title: Runs by Persona
panels.query: SELECT tb1_persona as persona, COUNT(*) as runs FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.phase.persona' AND tb1_persona IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' GROUP BY persona

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', _timestamp) as day, SUM(CAST(runtime_input_tokens AS BIGINT)) as input_tokens, SUM(CAST(runtime_output_tokens AS BIGINT)) as output_tokens FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
